description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and publish. In the test stage define four jobs (test_tox_34, test_tox_35, test_tox_36, test_tox_37) each using the python:<version>-alpine image (3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7 respectively), running a before_script that installs tox via pip and then executing tox -e py34 (or py35, py36, py37) as the script. In the publish stage add a publish_pypi job that uses python:3.7-alpine, runs a before_script to install twine and build a source distribution with python setup.py sdist, then uploads the distribution with twine upload dist/*, only when a Git tag is pushed, and provides TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD variables from $LIVE_PYPI_USERNAME and $LIVE_PYPI_PASSWORD to publish to PyPI.
